modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to set up new Toshiba copier.

full_description_text:  
So, during the chat, the user mentioned they need to get their new Toshiba copier all set up. They were just looking for help with that, but it seems like it hasn't been done yet. Just a simple request to get the copier ready to go!
short_description: Need to set up new Toshiba copier.
description: So, during the chat, the user mentioned they need to get their new Toshiba copier all set up. They were just looking for help with that, but it seems like it hasn't been done yet. Just a simple request to get the copier ready to go!
